name: Admanage AI Ad Management API
description: Admanage AI API for launching, managing, and reporting on ads across Facebook, TikTok, Snapchat, Pinterest, Google Ads, Axon/AppLovin, and Taboola. Includes media management, library, drafts, automation rules, and performance reporting.
